segments.text:
Empty hall
Dust on the shelves where the trophies would stand
Quiet house
You traded your name for a grain of sand
Now
Nothing fits right in this place
Gone
Tracing the lines of a ghost in your face
They ROGD us
Yeah they robbed us
Took the girl with the ribbons and the gold
They ROGD us
Yeah they robbed us
Left a story that was never meant to be told
Our daughter
Our daughter
Our daughter
Blue screen
Flicker and flash in the dead of the night
Changing fast
Hiding away from the morning light
You
Won't even look in my eyes
Wait
Sinking beneath all the synthetic lies
Cold
Heavy the weight of the clothes on the floor
They ROGD us
Yeah they robbed us
Took the girl with the ribbons and the gold
They ROGD us
Yeah they robbed us
Left a story that was never meant to be told
Our daughter
Our daughter
Our daughter
I see a stranger
I see a shadow
I see a wall
Where did you go
Where did you go
Where did you go
Bring her back to the garden
Bring her back to the sun
Bring her back to the start
They ROGD us
Yeah they robbed us
Took the girl with the ribbons and the gold
They ROGD us
Yeah they robbed us
Left a story that was never meant to be told
Our daughter
Our daughter
Our daughter
Robbed us
ROGD us
Slowly fading out
Fading out
Fading
Gones
